hero.headline: Supercharge Your No.JS Development
hero.subtitle: Intelligent completions, real-time diagnostics, hover docs, go-to-definition, and more — all inside VS Code.

features.title:
Everything you need,
right in your editor
features.subtitle: From intelligent completions to real-time diagnostics, the No.JS LSP brings the full framework knowledge into VS Code.

completions.title: Smart Completions
completions.desc: All 39+ directives, dynamic attributes, companion suggestions, event modifiers, filter arguments, i18n keys, routes, and store properties — context-aware and instant.

hover.title: Hover Documentation
hover.desc: Hover any directive, filter, or context key to see full documentation with syntax, examples, and companion attribute descriptions inline.

diagnostics.title: Real-Time Diagnostics
diagnostics.desc: Catch errors as you type — unknown directives with "did you mean?" suggestions, orphaned else blocks, duplicate refs, invalid modifiers, and expression syntax validation.

gotoDef.title: Go-to-Definition
gotoDef.desc: Jump directly from use="id" to its <template>, from $refs.name to the element, or from $store.name to its declaration. One click.

references.title: Find References
references.desc: Find every usage of a template ID, ref name, or store across your document — instant cross-reference navigation.

semantic.title: Semantic Highlighting
semantic.desc: Directives, dynamic prefixes, filter names, pipes, store references, and loop variables each get distinct syntax colors for maximum readability.

actions.title: Code Actions
actions.desc: Quick fixes: add missing as for HTTP directives, apply "did you mean?" corrections for typos — one-click fixes right from the yellow lightbulb.

inlayHints.title: Inlay Hints
inlayHints.desc: See loop variable names ($index, $count, $first, $last) and HTTP method badges inline, without reading documentation.

snippets.title: 23 Snippets
snippets.desc: Type nojs-if, nojs-foreach, nojs-get, nojs-store, nojs-form and expand into complete, ready-to-use patterns.

completions.title: Context-Aware Intelligence
completions.desc: The LSP understands the relationship between directives. Add a get directive and it instantly suggests companion attributes like as, error, empty, success, and cached.
items: i18n key and route path suggestions

highlighting.title: See Your Code in Full Color
highlighting.desc: Every No.JS construct gets its own semantic token type. Directives, filters, dynamic prefixes, pipes, and variables are colored distinctly — making your templates instantly scannable.

navigation.title: Navigate Your Templates Instantly
navigation.desc: Cmd+Click any template reference, ref name, or store access to jump to its definition. No more searching — the LSP knows exactly where everything is defined.
items: Find all usages across your document

config.title: Fine-Tune Your Experience
config.subtitle: All settings are optional — the extension works out of the box.

filters.desc: Show filter completions in pipe expressions

customFilters.desc: Additional custom filter names for completions

customValidators.desc: Additional custom validator names for completions

footer.desc: Intelligent VS Code extension for the No.JS framework. Smart completions, diagnostics, hover docs, and more.
